title: mimulus lewisii f. albus
intro: Mimulus lewisii f. albus, also known as the white monkey flower, is a white-flowered form of the Lewis' monkey flower, a plant native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mimulus lewisii f. albus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
